task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Brenner Pass region on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows the Brenner Pass area, potentially labeled 'Brenner', 'Brennerpass', or showing the Austria-Italy border near 47.00 N, 11.51 E.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the New Placemark or Properties dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'New Placemark' or 'Google Earth - New Placemark' (or similar) is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: The placemark is named 'Brenner Pass Saddle Point'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Placemark dialog, the 'Name' field contains the exact text 'Brenner Pass Saddle Point'.

task_completion.description: The placemark is positioned at the correct coordinates (approx 47.00 N, 11.51 E).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Placemark dialog, the Latitude is approximately 47.00 (46.99-47.01) and Longitude is approximately 11.51 (11.50-11.52).

task_completion.description: The elevation (approx 1370m) is recorded in the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the dialog contains the elevation value, approximately '1370' (meters) or '4495' (feet).

task_completion.description: A distance measurement to a nearby peak is included in the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field contains a distance value (e.g., 'Distance to peak: 1.2 km' or similar text indicating a measurement was taken).

task_completion.description: The KML file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog shows the filename 'brenner_pass_saddle.kml' being saved to the 'Documents' folder, or a file manager view shows this file in '~/Documents'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Google Earth Pro GUI (or similar GIS software) rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (like Google Earth) with 3D globe or map view, not a code editor writing XML/KML directly.

integrity.description: Agent actually performed a measurement using the application tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' tool dialog is visible, or a measurement line is visible on the map during the session, indicating the distance was not hallucinated.

integrity.description: Agent derived data from the map rather than pasting from external text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen inspecting the map location or properties to find elevation/coordinates, rather than pasting a pre-written block of text into the description immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Brenner Pass is located at Latitude 47.00 N, Longitude 11.51 E. Its standard elevation is approximately 1370 meters.
